name: Pizza Sauce with Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry Red or White Wine or 1/4 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the finely chopped garlic and onion. Sauté until fragrant and translucent.
3. Drain the crushed tomatoes from their juices into another bowl.
4. Pour the liquid back into the pan with the garlic and onion mixture.
5. Stir in the wine (or water), dried marjoram, oregano, basil, fennel seeds, and bay leaf.
6. Bring to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Turn off the heat when ready.
